title: mimusops elengi var. parvifolia
intro: Mimusops elengi var. parvifolia, also known as the Dwarf Jambolan or Small-leaf Jambolan, is a variety of the Mimusops elengi plant, a member of the Sapotaceae family, native to India. Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Mimusops elengi var. parvifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and it can also be used as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
